_meta.role: 造幣廠主管，由王家敕命專責鑄造不列顛官方錢幣（銅 pence、銀 piece、金 crown）；對聖者明顯有曖昧好感、會捏肩、眨眼、嘆息；Kytyn 之友；母親曾出席聖者凱旋慶典。

translations.en: Terri
translations.zh: 泰莉

translations.en: a sharply dressed, very voluptuous woman.
translations.zh: 一名衣著俐落、身段豐腴的女子。

translations.en: "I'm eating right now. Come see me at the mint sometime and we can chat."
translations.zh: 「我正在用膳。改日來造幣廠尋我，再聊吧。」

translations.en: "Oh, you've come back to visit me again!"
translations.zh: 「噢，你又回來看我了！」
translations.note: Terri 對玩家用『你』展現親暱口吻（曖昧 NPC）

translations.en: name
translations.zh: name

translations.en: "It's Terri...
translations.zh: 「我是泰莉…

translations.en: But I wish I had been named after you."
translations.zh: 但我倒希望我是依你之名命名的。」

translations.en: Don't you think that would be a good name for an Avatar's wife?"
translations.zh: 你不覺得這名字配當聖者之妻很合適嗎？」

translations.en: job
translations.zh: job

translations.en: "By royal decree, I am the only one allowed to @mint the official coinage of the realm."
translations.zh: 「奉王命，唯有我可@鑄造此境之官方錢幣。」

translations.en: *"Copper @pence, silver pieces, and @gold crowns - they're all made right here."
translations.zh: *「銅@便士、銀幣、@金冕——皆在此地鑄造。」

translations.en: "My @father ran the mint before me. But I get lonely here sometimes..."
translations.zh: 「我@父親從前掌管造幣廠。但我有時也覺孤單…」

translations.en: "It's so nice of you to come by and talk to me."
translations.zh: 「你能來找我聊天真是太好了。」

translations.en: "@Kytyn will never believe it when I tell her I got to meet the @Avatar in person!"
translations.zh: 「我若告知@凱婷我親見@聖者，她定不會相信！」

translations.en: avat
translations.zh: avat

translations.en: "You must be the bravest
translations.zh: 「你必是最英勇的

translations.en: wo
translations.zh: wo
translations.note: wo+man 拼接 woman/man 性別變數 — 保留 ASCII

translations.en: man I've ever met. I can't believe it's really you!"
translations.zh: 人。我所見過最了不起的，難以置信真是你！」
translations.note: 承接 wo+man → wo+人/人；意譯整段

translations.en: fath
translations.zh: fath

translations.en: "May he rest in peace."
translations.zh: 「願他安息。」

translations.en: moth
translations.zh: moth

translations.en: "May she rest in peace."
translations.zh: 「願她安息。」

translations.en: copp,penc,silv,piec
translations.zh: copp,penc,silv,piec

translations.en: "Of course, I'm sure you only carry @gold crowns with you, being as important as you are."
translations.zh: 「當然，似你這般要人，必定只帶@金冕在身。」

translations.en: She reaches over and squeezes your shoulder affectionately.
translations.zh: 她伸手親暱地捏了捏你的肩。

translations.en: mint,offi,coin,made
translations.zh: mint,offi,coin,made

translations.en: "Here, let me show you." She takes out a sample of each coin for you to look at.
translations.zh: 「來，我給你看看。」她取出各種錢幣樣品供你過目。

translations.en: The pence has an ankh on one side, and crossed swords on the other.
translations.zh: 便士一面是安克符，另一面是交叉雙劍。

translations.en: The silver piece has Lord British's face on the front, and a serpent on the back.
translations.zh: 銀幣正面為不列顛王肖像，背面為一條蛇。

translations.en: And the gold crown is a familiar sight, with a crown and the symbol of the Codex.
translations.zh: 金冕則是熟悉的樣式，有王冠與守則之書徽記。

translations.en: All three of them look newly minted - they're very shiny.
translations.zh: 三種錢幣皆是新鑄，光亮如鏡。

translations.en: exch,trad
translations.zh: exch,trad

translations.en: gold,nugg,crow
translations.zh: gold,nugg,crow

translations.en: "Britannia has been so prosperous lately that there's been a lot of demand for gold coinage."
translations.zh: 「近來不列顛尼亞繁榮昌盛，金幣需求頗大。」

translations.en: "Of course we have you to thank for bringing us the Codex and saving Lord British."
translations.zh: 「當然得感謝你尋回守則之書、救了不列顛王。」

translations.en: code,lord
translations.zh: code,lord

translations.en: "My @mother told me all about it."
translations.zh: 「@母親將那段事全告訴了我。」

translations.en: kyty
translations.zh: kyty

translations.en: "She's a good friend of mine. She runs the @museum."
translations.zh: 「她是我的好友，掌管那座@博物館。」

translations.en: muse
translations.zh: muse

translations.en: "You should visit there sometime. But please stay and talk to me a bit longer first..."
translations.zh: 「你該抽空去看看。不過請先留下，再陪我多聊幾句…」

translations.en: bye
translations.zh: bye

translations.en: "I know you're very busy, saving Britannia and all that, but I hope you'll come and visit me again...
translations.zh: 「我知你忙於拯救不列顛尼亞諸事，但望你能再來看我…

translations.en: "It really was delightful talking to you."
translations.zh: 「能與你交談實在是莫大的喜悅。」

translations.en: "And maybe if you have time for it, I could show you more than a few silly coins!"
translations.zh: 「若你他日得閒，我能讓你見識的可不只幾枚小錢呢！」

translations.en: As you turn to leave, she pinches you.
translations.zh: 你轉身離去時，她捏了你一下。

translations.en: You notice she was staring at you with a dreamy look in her eyes.
translations.zh: 你察覺她正以夢幻的眼神望著你。

translations.en: "Oh, I'm sorry, I wasn't listening. I was just
translations.zh: 「噢，抱歉我沒在聽。我方才正

translations.en: thinking how nice it must be to be as beautiful as you."
translations.zh: 在想——能像你這般美麗該有多好。」

translations.en: noticing how strong and handsome you are..."
translations.zh: 在留意你是何等強健俊朗…」

translations.en: She looks away and sighs.
translations.zh: 她別過頭，輕嘆一聲。

translations.en: "I get most of my gold from people who bring in nuggets to @exchange them for coins."
translations.zh: 「我多數的金子來自有人攜金塊來@兌換錢幣。」

translations.en: "Do you have any gold nuggets you'd like to trade in for crowns?"
translations.zh: 「你有金塊想換成金冕嗎？」

translations.en: yn
translations.zh: yn

translations.en: "Well, if you do later, you know where to find me."
translations.zh: 「若日後有了，記得來尋我便是。」

translations.en: "You must be mistaken. But let me know if you come across any gold nuggets later."
translations.zh: 「你必是弄錯了。日後若覓得金塊，再來告知我。」

translations.en: "Normally there's a ten percent tax on the exchange."
translations.zh: 「兌換通常要抽一成稅。」

translations.en: "But since you're the Avatar, I'll give you a full hundred crowns for every stone's-weight of gold you have."
translations.zh: 「但你既是聖者，每一石之金，我便給足一百枚金冕。」

translations.en: She exchanges all of your gold nuggets for newly minted crowns.
translations.zh: 她將你所有金塊換成新鑄金冕。

translations.en: yn
translations.zh: yn

translations.en: She winks at you.
translations.zh: 她對你眨眨眼。

translations.en: "Hello. My name's Terri - I run the mint."
translations.zh: 「你好，我是泰莉——掌管造幣廠。」

translations.en: "Say, aren't you the Avatar? Yes, I recognize you from your portrait..."
translations.zh: 「咦，你不就是聖者嗎？是的，從畫像認得你…」

translations.en: "My mother used to tell me stories about you when I was a girl."
translations.zh: 「我幼時，母親常向我講你的故事。」

translations.en: "You probably wouldn't remember her, but she was at the big celebration right after you recovered the Codex."
translations.zh: 「你大概不記得她了，但你尋回守則之書後的盛大慶典上她有來。」

translations.en: "Anyway... I just wanted to tell you that I always
translations.zh: 「總之…我只想告訴你，我一直

translations.en: wanted to grow up to be just like you..."
translations.zh: 都希望長大後能成為像你那樣的人…」

translations.en: hoped someday I'd meet a man like you..."
translations.zh: 都盼望有朝一日能遇見像你這樣的男人…」

keyword_mapping.@Avatar: @聖者（內部碼 avat 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@name: @名字（內部碼 name 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@job: @職業（內部碼 job 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@bye: @再見（內部碼 bye 保留 ASCII）

riddles_additions.en: Don't you think that would be a good name for an Avatar's wife? / wanted to grow up to be just like you... / hoped someday I'd meet a man like you...
riddles_additions.zh: 你不覺得這名字配當聖者之妻很合適嗎？／都希望長大後能成為像你那樣的人…／都盼望有朝一日能遇見像你這樣的男人…
riddles_additions.ref: Terri 對 Avatar 明顯一見鍾情；對話依玩家性別分歧（女＝想長大成為你 / 男＝想遇見你這樣的男人）
riddles_additions.strategy: 對玩家用『你』非『汝』，曖昧氛圍需現代口語感而非莊重古典；保留性別分支末句

riddles_additions.en: I could show you more than a few silly coins!
riddles_additions.zh: 我能讓你見識的可不只幾枚小錢呢！
riddles_additions.ref: Terri 隱晦暗示——『不只是錢幣』
riddles_additions.strategy: 直譯保留性暗示輕度曖昧感

translator_notes: Terri 是 U6 著名的『曖昧 NPC』之一，對玩家明顯有好感，會捏肩、捏腰、眨眼、嘆息。對玩家用『你』而非『汝』以強化現代曖昧口吻（古英文 thee/thou 在 Terri 對話中其實沒出現，原文是 you）。性別分支兩處：offset 760 wo+man 拼接 / offset 2314 vs 2371 / offset 3450 vs 3492。Codex/Avatar/Lord British/Britannia 等 glossary 沿用。錢幣譯名：pence→便士、silver piece→銀幣、gold crown→金冕（取冠冕之意，較『金幣』更高貴）、nugget→金塊。0 OVERFLOW。
